title: Preparing Aminoacid Solutions for cell free Tx-TL reactions
steps: Take the given mass of each aminoacid into individual 5mL tubes. %s %s Add 1mL of 5M KOH to each of the individual tubes. Vortex to disolve and stock at 4 °C up for a month.

%s %s Aminoacid Stock solution in 5M KOH µl to take Alanine 136 Arginine 222 Asparagine 136 Aspartic acid 136 Cysteine 222 Glutamic acid 136 Glutamine 222 Glycine 136 Histidine 136 Isoleucine 136 Leucine 222 Lysine 222 Methionine 222 Phenylalanine 340 Proline 136 Serine 136 Threonine 136 Tryptophan 340 Tyrosine 222 Valine 222 TOTAL 3816 µL Add 35084 µl of sterile water and 1100 µl of acetil acid (glacial) to the aminoacid mix. Vortex well and alicuote. Store at -20°C
creator: Andres Medina
